next_task_title: Android app：移除运行时剩余 mock 数据并接入真实落地数据
note: Compose realification is now in active implementation, not audit-only. Clean worktrees produced compiled P0/P1 slices, accepted P2 Core commit d9ce058a on branch codex/liaojiang-0jp-p2core, and integration branch codex/liaojiang-0jp-integrate now contains P0/P1 plus P2 Core commit acfdeeda and P2 Extended uiState-driven screen commit 506ec757. Integration compile passes with :app:compileFdroidDebugKotlin. The current blocker is no longer page overlap; it is device-side route-harness regression on the Oppo test phone, where adb shell launch of the debug harness is bounced back to launcher, so per-route runtime evidence must currently use launcher/manual navigation or a more robust debug entrypoint.
